transcript: Woman: I am very sentiment. AI: I am very sentimental bola uchit. Na hole 'I'm an emotional person' bolo. [You should say 'I am very sentimental'. Otherwise, say 'I'm an emotional person'.] Woman: Oh, emon naki? English kibhabe shikbo? [Oh, is that so? How will I learn English?] AI: Amar sathe roj shudhu 15 minutes daily practice koro, shudhu 1 maser moddhei English shikhe jabe. [Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily, you will learn English in just 1 month.] Woman: Eta to onek expensive hobe, tai na? [This will be very expensive, right?] AI: Shudhu 1 takatei ei app puro try korte paro. 50 lakhs er beshi lok amar sathe English shikche. [You can try this app fully for just 1 rupee. More than 50 lakh people are learning English with me.] Woman: Wow! Kibhabe join korbo? [Wow! How do I join?] AI: Ekhoni MySivi app download koro, aar English shekha shuru kore dao. [Download the MySivi app right now, and start learning English.]
